# Pull Request

## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API change or removal)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Changes
- 

## Testing
Describe the tests added or modified. All tests must pass:
```bash
make test
```

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`make test`)
- [ ] Docstrings updated (NumPy style)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] `ruff` passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] No breaking changes to public API (or clearly documented)
- [ ] `__all__` updated in relevant `__init__.py` if new public symbols added
